refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the portions of a geometry that lie in an elevation (Z) range.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a geometry (collection) with the portions of a geometry that lie in an elevation (Z) range.
Clipping a non-convex POLYGON may produce invalid geometry.
Enhanced: 3.0.0 - added support for POLYGON, TIN, TRIANGLE.

refsection.title: Examples
